data.title: Eimskip bought 40,000 shares at ISK 10,580,000 in week 4 of 2026 for a share buy-back program.
data.description: During the fourth week of 2026, Eimskip bought back 40,000 shares of its stock for a total of ISK 10,580,000.

data.title: Aesyra's clinical study shows AesyBite™ Active reduces sleep bruxism; significant results achieved.
data.description: A Swiss medtech company, Aesyra SA, based in Lausanne, has recently completed a clinical investigation on their digital therapeutic product, AesyBite™ Active. This innovative oral appliance is specifically designed to address sleep bruxism, a condition related to dental and sleep disorders. The study focused on assessing the effectiveness and safety of AesyBite™ Active, showcasing promising results. The investigation revealed that the product successfully treats and prevents sleep bruxism through biofeedback mechanisms. A noteworthy outcome of the study was the statistically significant and clinically meaningful results achieved by AesyBite™ Active. This development marks a significant step forward in addressing dental and sleep-related issues with cutting-edge digital therapeutics.

data.title: New Earth Resources signs service agreement with APEX Geoscience for professional consulting. (Character count: 84)
data.description: In Vancouver, British Columbia, on January 26, 2026, New Earth Resources Corp. (CSE: EATH) disclosed a service deal with APEX Geoscience Ltd., a proficient geoscience consulting firm. APEX excels in professional geological consulting, exploration management, and technical reporting. This agreement marks a significant development for New Earth as it aims to leverage the expertise of APEX for its operations.

data.title: Cboe Global Markets appoints Scott Johnston as COO and Heidi Fischer as head of Equities; Chris Isaacson to retire.
data.description: In recent news, Scott Johnston has been named as the new Executive Vice President and Chief Operating Officer while Heidi Fischer will take on the role of Executive Vice President and Global Head of Equities and Spot Markets. It has been announced that current Chief Operating Officer, Chris Isaacson, will retire from his position on March 6, 2026, but will continue to serve as an advisor during the transition. These appointments signify a significant change in leadership within the company as it moves forward.

data.title: Buyers Edge Platform acquires UK-based United Fresh Consortium, its first European fresh produce acquisition.
data.description: Buyers Edge Platform, based in WALTHAM, Mass., disclosed on Jan. 26, 2026, its acquisition of the United Fresh Consortium (UFC), a UK platform specializing in fresh produce. As a prominent digital procurement network for the foodservice sector, this acquisition is a significant strategic development for Buyers Edge Platform.

data.title: "TV segment featuring Andy Garcia highlights MSPCA-Angell's animal health advancements. Aired on Public Television in Los Angeles on Jan. 26, 2026."
data.description: A forthcoming TV segment will delve into the merging of scientific expertise and financial advice tailored for pet caregivers. Set in Los Angeles, the segment is scheduled for Jan. 26, 2026. Viewers of Public Television can anticipate gaining insights into the evolving landscape of animal well-being in the upcoming segment of "All...".

data.title: Hankook navigates challenging Rallye Monte-Carlo in 2026 WRC opener with versatile rally tires amid changing conditions.
data.description: The 2026 WRC season opener was marked by challenging winter conditions in the Alps, emphasizing the importance of strategy and adaptability. Hankook's rally tires played a key role in ensuring stable competition on high-speed tarmac, snow, and ice terrains during the demanding Monte-Carlo stages. data.title: Linnovate, alternative investment asset services provider, introduces new brand identity after 10 years of growth and innovation.
data.description: Today, on January 26, 2026, in Singapore, Linnovate, a worldwide company offering comprehensive asset services for the alternative investment sector, revealed its updated brand identity. This rebranding marks a significant milestone for the company, symbolizing ten years of expansion, creativity, and strategic development. Formerly recognized as Linnovate, the company is now portraying a new image to the world.

data.title: Elbit Systems gets $228M contract for Iron Fist APS for US Army Bradley IFVs.
data.description: On January 26, 2026, in Haifa, Israel, Elbit Systems Ltd. declared the US Government's recent award on September 29, 2025, to General Dynamics Ordnance and Tactical Systems (GD-OTS). Elbit Systems, listed on NASDAQ as ESLT and TASE as ESLT, made this announcement.

data.title: TotalEnergies extends Waha Concessions in Libya until 2050, aiming to increase production from current 370,000 barrels.
data.description: During the recent Libya Energy & Economy Summit in Tripoli, Patrick Pouyanné, TotalEnergies' Chairman and CEO, signed a deal on January 24th extending the Waha Concessions until December 31, 2050. This agreement was signed in the presence of Abdul Hamid Dbeiba, the Prime Minister of the Government of National Unity. The agreement introduces revised fiscal terms aimed at boosting production levels from these concessions, which are presently yielding about 370,000 barrels.
